ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis of the patient */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who attended the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date the session took place */,
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the therapist who conducted the session */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., initial assessment, follow-up) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_therapist_id FOREIGN KEY ("therapist_id") REFERENCES therapists ("therapist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "therapists" (
  "therapist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each therapist */,
  "therapist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the therapist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the therapist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the therapist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the therapist */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the therapist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("therapist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., regression coefficient, maximum energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the feature */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value range for the feature */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value range for the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_feature_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature value */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the feature value belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the feature value was recorded in */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the value represents */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_feature_values_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_feature_values_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_feature_values_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Spectral Features, Temporal Features) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the feature belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES feature_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_category_map_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., therapist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who the version belongs to */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the version was recorded in */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature the version represents */,
  "version" REAL /* Version number of the feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES audio_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
